summary: All 9 criteria pass. /stop deterministic slash + classifier steer:stop/inspect via shared handleStop; stop() resolves pid from PidSidecar, injected KillFn with ESRCH tolerance, flips roster to 'aborted' via writeRunState (not RunManager.abortRun). Unknown/non-running runId never kills. steer:inspect reuses RosterReader.summarize. Full suite 1920 passed, 0 failed; no SDK in src/chat.
